metadata.description: Public agent skills from Nothing Fancy — narrowly-scoped, evals-first, harness-neutral.

plugins.name: spec-anchored-development
plugins.description: Treats specifications as living system maps with a bidirectional graph to code. Use when asked to create a spec, write a specification, generate a spec from code, maintain specs, sync specs with code, or mention spec-anchored development. Supports Python, Go, and TypeScript.

plugins.name: justfile
plugins.description: Authors and maintains global and project justfiles using opinionated conventions — positional arguments, working-directory attributes, shebang recipes, and avoiding thin alias chains. Use when writing, editing, or reviewing a justfile or when the user mentions just or command runners.
